heading: PagerDuty
body:
To create or update a PagerDuty integration using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas integrations create PAGER_DUTY [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas integrations create PAGER\_DUTY](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-integrations-create-PAGER_DUTY).
